name: Shrimp & Scallop Kabobs
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Sea Scallops, Cut in Half
2 Tbsp Crystalized Ginger OR 1 1/2 tsp Ground Ginger
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and devein the shrimp.
2. Drain the pineapple chunks.
3. Use imported soy sauce if available for better flavor; otherwise use domestic soy sauce.
4. In a medium bowl, combine oil, lemon juice, soy sauce, garlic, ginger, and onion powder; mix well.
5. Add shrimp and scallops to the marinade and cover. Refrigerate for 3 hours or overnight.
6. Assemble kabobs by placing shrimp, scallops, pineapple pieces, and zucchini slices on bamboo skewers that have soaked in water for at least 1 hour, or use metal skewers.
7. Grill or broil the kabobs for 3 to 6 minutes per side, basting frequently with marinade.
8. Refrigerate leftovers.
